title: Record: Budgeted Two-Pass N-gram Backoff — val_bpb 0.11814796 (3-seed mean)
author: aamodbhatt

data.description: Budgeted two-pass tuner that dynamically caps rescoring chunks based on observed throughput and remaining evaluation budget

novel_contributions: Dynamic rescoring chunk cap based on eval budget
Order-12 N-gram backoff interpolation with weighted high-order backoff
Score-first evaluation path maintained without tokenizer or dataset changes
